Compliance.description: Licensed insurer, FSCA regulated, Santam subsidiary, clean regulatory standing.

Customer Satisfaction.description: HelloPeter 3.5/5; mixed; some claim delays; good satisfaction for routine.

Product Value.description: Competitive direct insurer; no brokers; good personal lines cover; some complaints on claim value.

Innovation.description: App, online portal, self-service, digital claims, MiWay Blink usage-based insurance.

Customer Support.description: 24/7 call centre; online/app; mixed on dispute resolution.

Accessibility & Security.description: App, web, no broker; national coverage; POPIA compliance as major insurer.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: Competitive direct; vehicle/home/personal liability; quotes online

socialSentiment.summary: Mixed; competitive pricing praised; claims process complaints moderate.
